sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70086" key="nekrodo/kos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεκρο-δόκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n70086.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">νεκροδέγμων</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">receiving the dead,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κλιντήρ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.634</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
